vol_description:
Labs participating in ManyBabies 1: Infant-Directed Speech Preference were asked to provide a walkthrough video to illustrate their procedure. Here we collect videos that can be made public (42 of 69 contributing labs). 

The detailed instructions on making walkthrough videos can be found here: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1NhstgGOWZYY19diq5eRdnxmqyW9vLQSObcpxtfsyhe8
